title: Honeysticks Super Jumbo Bath Crayons Non Toxic (7 Pack) for Toddlers 1-3 and Kids 4-8, Natural Beeswax Crayons, Food-Grade Colours, Fragrance Free, Non Irritating, Bath Toys for Bathtub, Shower, Gift
features: PURITY YOU CAN TRUST - Crafted in New Zealand from pure Beeswax and Soy Wax with non-toxic food-grade colours. Absolutely NO petroleum based paraffin wax or industrial colour pigments that you find in many other bathtub crayons.

SAFE FOR EVEN THE YOUNGEST ARTISTS (1 Year+) - Honeysticks is the only Brand tested to the highest safety standards for Little Ones aged 1 Year+. Fragrance free, non-irritating ingredients for delicate young skin. Perfect first Bath Crayons for Toddlers 1-3.

EASY GRIP FOR SMALL, WET HANDS - Honeysticks Super Jumbo Bath Crayons are our biggest Bath Crayons (10cm long and 2cm thick), perfect for the littlest hands to hold and use. Won't disintegrate in water or snap easily like others.

WASHABLE, EASY TO CLEAN - Easily wipe off most non-porous surfaces (we recommend testing a small area first). When bathtime is over, simply give the bath tub or shower a wipe with a warm cloth and rinse the colour away.
7 BRIGHT COLOURS TO SPARK CREATIVITY - Your little artist can choose from 7 vibrant colours to encourage creativity and imagination with their bath art.

SO MANY WAYS TO USE - Great for use in the bath tub, on shower tiles, glass and mirrors. Perfect fun bath toys for drawing, games, practicing words and numbers... the creative possibilities are endless. Packaged in a tin with shower holes for extra bath fun for kids!

GENTLE ON THE PLANET - Unlike others that are wrapped in plastic, Honeysticks Bath Crayons have a unique wrapper made from crushed rocks (how cool is that!). Packaged in a recyclable metal tin. Great eco friendly gift for kids that will be much loved by boys and girls alike.

CREATIVITY THAT IS SAFE FOR KIDS AND THE PLANET - Our Mission at Honeysticks is to create safe, sustainable products that will spark your Childs' creativity in the important early years. Explore our store today to discover the full range.
description: Product Description Safe Bath-time Fun for Kids Honeysticks Bath Crayons are the safest choice for your Kids. Made with a Natural Beeswax and Soy Wax Blend. The vibrant colours are made from food-grade pigments so they are completely non-toxic! Free from paraffin wax and other chemical nasties. 7 Vibrant Colours to Inspire Creativity Each pack of Honeysticks Bath Crayons comes with 7 vibrant colours that transfer easily to the Bath or Shower. Easy to Hold and Use Honeysticks Bath Crayons are long and thick so they are easy for little hands to hold and use. At 10cm long and 2cm in diameter, they are much bigger than other Bath Crayons and will last and last. Perfect for Bath and Shower Use Honeysticks Bath Crayons are just as fun in the shower as they are in the bath! Easy to Clean Suitable for most bath and shower surfaces (do a spot test first). We recommend wiping the bath down straight after use for the best results. Gentle on the Planet Honeysticks Bath Crayons come in a beautiful metal canister that can be reused or recycled. The wrapper is made from a unique crushed rock, unlike other Bath Crayons that use a plastic wrapper that goes straight to landfill.
